phase_field_literal_note: The next_phase field is typed as string|null, but the full live-route mutation remains rejected because phase-class and route-contract fields do not admit the requested class.
required_schema_change: Add purgatorium_full_authority_materialization to the enum of properties.active_next_phase_class, properties.current_live_route.properties.active_next_phase_class, and properties.next_action.properties.phase_class, then version the schema change explicitly.
risk_if_changed: Changing the schema without a matching validator, Próxima fase, and active-context sync path can create false PASS conditions or drift between JSON, mirrors, and route policy.
